---
title: "r markdown gp2"
author: "Daniel Gomez"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Day 1: Data Import
#Load these libraries
library(tidyverse)

#Import dataset, keep the csv in the data folder
nhis_data <- read.csv("data/NHIS _Data_2021.csv")
#Initial Exploration no cleaning
cat("Data Structure:\n")
str(nhis_data)
cat("\nSumarry Statistics:\n")
summary(nhis_data)

cat("\nFirst 6 Rows:\n")
head(nhis_data)
```

```{r}
# Day 2: Data Cleaning

```
